stemHtml: Which of the following calculations would be equal to the amount of trip fuel?

options.a: Trip Fuel = TOM – DOM – Traffic Load – Contingency Fuel – Alternate Fuel – Final Reserve Fuel – Extra Fuel
options.b: Trip Fuel = TOM – DOM – Traffic Load – Taxi Fuel – Contingency Fuel – Alternate Fuel – Final Reserve Fuel – Extra Fuel
options.c: Trip Fuel = TOM – DOM – Contingency Fuel – Alternate Fuel – Final Reserve Fuel – Extra Fuel
options.d: Trip Fuel = TOM – Traffic Load – Contingency Fuel – Alternate Fuel – Final Reserve Fuel – Extra Fuel
